[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Capoeira PR #18 review + TrueSight DAO evolution / CMO blog pitch
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/18
  
  Details:
  End-of-session review verification + strategic discussion overlay for the capoeira practice fix (PR #18).
  
  Beyond the 30-min fix already logged (PR #18 squash-merged 2026-05-10), this entry covers the additional work in the same session:
  
  1. Strategic read-through of agentic_ai_context/ + the capoeira and tribomirimbahia repos. Drafted a two-part analysis for Gary:
     - "How TrueSight DAO has evolved" — three eras (cacao supply-chain → DAO-as-OS → heritage-funding rails), plus a deeper architectural read of the five-layer signed-event spine (dapp client → Edgar Rails → Sheets → treasury-cache JSON → static readers).
     - Seth-Godin-as-CMO blog post pitch for truesight.me — "The smallest viable temple" — applying permission marketing, smallest-viable-audience, Purple Cow, and stories-over-facts to the new Tribo Bahia Mirim donation transparency surface.
  
  2. Local server review of PR #18 fix: served capoeira/ on http://localhost:8000, confirmed final-move "Finish Session →" button behaviour with Gary, then tore down the server.
  
  No additional code shipped beyond PR #18; this is the analysis + reviewer-loop time.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
